channel.title: Hello on Shankar's Quest
channel.description: Recent content in Hello on Shankar's Quest

item.title: Norns in hand: first power-on
item.description: Three years of planning compressed into the moment of pressing the boot button. Notes from Phase 0 of the music dev journey.

item.title: About
item.description:
What this is

A working journal across three project threads — music, games, and LLM foundations — plus reflective pieces that don’t fit any single project.

The structure is simple: each post belongs to a pillar (or to “journal” if it doesn’t). The pillar pages collect posts from one thread; the home page surfaces recent work across all of them.

· · ·

Who I am

Shankar Arunachalam. South Indian, based in the UK. Carnatic musician working with my own tradition. Composer and creator more than performer. I’ve been writing software for a long time and writing publicly less consistently than I’d like.

item.title: Superbooth, in fragments
item.description: Three days at FEZ Berlin among synth makers. What I learned, what I bought, what I watched other people fall in love with.

item.title: Micrograd, written by hand
item.description: The first lecture of Karpathy’s series and what it teaches you that’s not the math.
